pages.text: An Attuned Stone is used to create various magical artifacts and devices.$(p)The Attuned Stone is significantly valued in whichcraft, as it has the property to store $(l:altar/altar#power)Altar Power$(/l), acting as a portable source for $(l:circle_magic/intro)Circle Magic$(/l).
Before one can use the Attuned Stone for Rituals, the Stone must be charging using the appropriate $(l:circle_magic/other/charge_attuned_stone)Rite$(/l)
